title.en: In that case, the Terrans would not be as prosp...

content.en:
When Ye Tian's ontology retreat created the Endless Ancestor Method, the progress of the doppelganger Qingye Ancestor slowed down.

After all, the clone of the Aoba Ancestor was raised by Ye Tian's pursuit of speed, and it was not comparable to the ontology at all, so the potential was far inferior to the ontology, and the Aoba Ancestor clone was a space ancestor method that fused with the Void Ancestor.

After all, at that time, in order to pursue a quick promotion to the Ancestor, there was naturally no way to think too much, and there was not so much time to slowly create the Ancestor Method, otherwise if the others were promoted to the Ancestor first, then the other party might attack the Terran, or even the ontology.

In that case, the Terrans would not be as prosperous as they are now.

Since it was not promoted by the Self-Founding Ancestor Method, the potential of the Aoba Ancestor was limited, and now it was about to reach its limit, and it was only possible to break the limit unless it got a better opportunity.

And those Silent Annihilation Treasures can only improve their cultivation, and there is no way for the Aoba Ancestor clone to break the limit.

"The Aoba Ancestor clone is currently estimated to only be able to reach the powerful level of the Elite Ancestor, second only to the Top Ancestor, and with the help of the Dark Soul Domain, it can compete with the Top Ancestor. In the future, no matter how much you refine the Silent Annihilation Treasure, the increase in strength will be limited!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, the Aoba Ancestor clone can still make progress now, but it is only many times slower than before, so he is a little disdainful.

If the other ancestors knew about Ye Tian's progress speed, they would be extremely jealous.

Ye Tian couldn't look at the speed of progress, even top ancestors like the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor were very envious.

......

Time passes from realm year to realm.

At a time when the eyes of many ancestors and forces were focused on the Dark Soul Realm, almost no one cared about a place like the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Even if something happened here, no one cared.

And one of Ye Tian's incarnations has been sitting in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, paying attention to the changes in the Xuanxu Holy Realm all the time.

At this time, the Xuanxu Saint Realm was already many times larger than in the past, and even many rare resources and holy relics were born, and treasures that only the Ancestral Realm were born in.

In addition, a large number of treasures were also born in the Heavenly and Human Realms of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and the Star Taboo Tree also gave birth to the Star Taboo Fruit again, which was enough for many Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Human Race to refine the Invincible Domain to the extreme realm of the Invincible Domain.

Although compared to the Dark Soul Domain, the resources of the Xuanxu Saint Realm are very low-end, far inferior to the Dark Soul Domain.

However, the potential here is very high, no less than the Dark Souls Domain, and it is even expected to become the fourth Dark Sanctuary in the future.

"The Xuanxu Holy Realm is about to become the Ancestral Realm, but we can't let the Xuanxu Sacred Realm become the Ancestral Realm now, otherwise it will inevitably attract the attention of the ancestors. My main body and the ancestor clone are all guarding the Dark Soul Realm, and I can't manage the Xuanxu Holy Realm for the time being, so I must suppress the promotion of the Xuanxu Holy Realm!"

Ye Tian thought.

He was going to wait for the ontology to create the Endless Ancestor Method, and after being promoted to the Ancestor, he would let the Xuanxu Holy Realm evolve into the Ancestral Realm.

In that case, he would also be able to resist the prying eyes of other ancestors, and he could even explain that he had obtained a treasure from the Dark Soul Realm, which would allow the Xuanxu Holy Realm to be promoted to the Ancestral Realm.

In this way, the attention of the ancestors can be put on the Dark Soul Realm, and no one will spy on the secrets of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

this day.

The human race had a happy event, and an invincible domain ancestor was promoted to the realm of a superior domain ancestor in the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

As a result, many Invincible Domain Ancestors could not be promoted to Superior Domain Ancestors in the Dark Soul Domain, and they also felt that the Dark Soul Domain was not suitable for the Domain Ancestors to cultivate, so they returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm one by one.

Gradually, almost all of the Dark Soul Domains were Terran Soul Ancestors, and the Domain Ancestors all returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Before you know it, the 100 realm years from the birth of the Dark Soul Domain are approaching, and the ancestors of the major forces are ready to move.

Battle Ancestral Realm.

The two ancestors of the Battle Gate have also returned here a long time ago, leaving only the avatar to stay outside the Dark Soul Domain.

At this time, Zhan Zu and Jie Ancestor were chatting with one of Ye Tian's avatars.

"Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor, it will soon be 100 realm years, the Ancestor of Destruction is afraid that he will attack the Ancestor of your human race, you give me a thorough idea, what is the strength of the Ancestor of the Aoba now, and after using part of the power of the Dark Soul Domain, is there any hope of resisting the Ancestor of Destruction? If we can't resist it, we must give up the territory of the Dark Soul Domain and join forces with the major holy gates of the Dark Soul Domain to fight against the Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain. As long as the benefits offered are large enough, they will still join forces with us. "

Ye Tian smiled and said: "Battle Ancestor, Realm Ancestor, don't worry, the strength of the Qingye Ancestor has now reached the top level of the Elite Ancestor, second only to the Top Ancestor, under the increase of the Dark Soul Domain, it is definitely possible to exert the combat power of the Top Ancestor, and it is no problem to block the Destruction Ancestor! However, even so, we must give up a part of the territory, otherwise we will not be able to stop all the Ancestors!"

Ye Tian had never thought of completely dominating the entire Dark Soul Domain, but it was no problem to occupy the best area, and it was not a big problem to give up the other areas to the other Holy Gates and the Dark Destruction Domain Ancestors.

"That's good!"

Zhan Ancestor and Realm Ancestor nodded slightly.

Although it was very abnormal for the strength of the Aoba Ancestor to improve so quickly, they were not surprised, after all, it was normal for the Aoba Ancestor to be promoted to the Ancestor in such a short period of time, and it was normal to have such strength!

At the beginning, the Holy Ancestor was the same.

However, they didn't expect that the Aoba Ancestor would be Ye Tian's clone at all.

Ye Tian didn't reveal the slightest, otherwise some secrets would have been leaked.

------------------

Dark Souls.

Ye Tian was already at a critical moment, he was about to create the Endless Ancestor Method.

Some more years have passed.

this day.

Countless flashes of inspiration appeared in Ye Tian's mind, the essence of the Ancestor Law of a sect was fused together, coupled with dozens of years of comprehension and research perceptions, and finally these perceptions were integrated.

The Endless Ancestor Law was finally created.

Rumble!!!!

In the depths of the soul, one by one the words of the Ancestor Law, these words merged into a ball, and the endless mysteries of the Ancestors permeated out.

This ball is the Endless Ancestor Law Inheritance, which has officially appeared at this moment.

The Endless Ancestor Law has been created, and it is not yet completely finalized, it is still evolving, deriving many Ancestor Mysteries, and finally deriving the mysteries of the Three Thousand Ancestor Laws, and even more endless Ancestral Law Mysteries.

It seems to be a collection of countless ancestral laws.

This is the true Endless Ancestor Method!

This evolution took trillions of years before it was finally completed and turned into the most perfect Endless Ancestor Method.

The Endless Ancestor Method was created, and then Ye Tian only needed to comprehend and comprehend the Endless Ancestor Fly, and then fuse it, and then become the Ancestor.

And the Endless Ancestor Method was created by Ye Tian, although it evolved into a more perfect form, he was also able to quickly and thoroughly comprehend it and easily fuse the Endless Ancestor Method.

Therefore, it won't be long before he can become an ancestor!
